member.name: T:Model.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Model.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Model.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Model.DefProductInventoryLevelLog
member.summary: this class is needed for saving the log activity on inventory screen
member.remarks: added by hafiz ahsan raza against 6306

member.name: F:Model.SaleAndReturnItems._CustomerDiscount
member.summary: R@! CR 6406 added new property to add customer discount per unit based on pack qty
